description: Curated report-scale checkpoints; evaluation does not retrain the offline PINN or streamed PINO.

offline_baseline_pinn.pt.role: Physics-only DeepXDE warm start trained at 4.0 MW/m2

adaptive_balanced_pinn.pt.role: Locked-case adaptive posterior; new cases start from offline_baseline_pinn.pt and adapt only online

streamed_pino.pt.role: Best mixed-boundary streamed PINO checkpoint selected at epoch 350
